---
name: 📚 Documentation Request
about: Report missing, unclear, or outdated documentation
title: "[Docs]: "
labels: ["documentation", "needs-triage"]
assignees: []
---

## Which doc is missing or unclear?

<!-- Link to the file or section, or describe where you expected to find the info.
     Examples: README.md "Environment Setup" section, docs/setup.md step 3, missing API reference for /api/moments. -->

## What should it cover?

<!-- What questions should the doc answer? What examples would help?
     A bulleted list works well:
     - How to enable Bedrock in a non-us-east-1 region
     - Sample .env.local for local dev
     - Expected Supabase RLS errors and how to interpret them
-->

## Who would benefit?

<!-- e.g. New contributors setting up the repo for the first time.
        Self-hosters deploying to Render / Fly.io.
        Designers building a new theme without touching backend code. -->

## Additional Context

<!-- Screenshots of confusing UI, error messages encountered, or quotes from the existing doc that need rewriting. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I searched existing docs (`README.md`, `docs/*`) and didn't find this covered
- [ ] I searched [open issues](https://github.com/Nandansai08/momentsAi/issues?q=is%3Aissue+label%3Adocumentation) for duplicates
- [ ] I'd be willing to draft a PR for this (optional)
